THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUBO, ANGEL DBA GIFT 4 U IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AVORION, ALORAH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
